successCriteria.description: File src/modules/ping/ping.service.ts exists and exports class PingService
getPing() method returns { status: 'ok' } typed as PingResponse (imported from ./ping.model)
Follows the same structural pattern as UptimeService in src/modules/uptime/uptime.service.ts (imports, class declaration, method body style)

constraints: Must import IPingService from ./ping.service.interface (exact path, relative to the file being created)
Must import PingResponse from ./ping.model (exact path, relative to the file being created)
Class must be exported as PingService implementing IPingService
getPing() must return exactly { status: 'ok' } — the literal string 'ok', not a variable or computed value
No dependencies on any other module — this is a pure leaf module with zero imports beyond the two Phase 1 files
Must follow the existing UptimeService pattern: class declaration, implements clause, method returning a typed object literal
outOfScope: Phase 3: Creating src/modules/ping/ping.routes.ts (Fastify route registration for GET /ping)
Phase 5: Updating src/app.ts to register ping routes
Any test files for PingService — tests are not in scope for this phase
